chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 361 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1,2,3,5,6,7,10 & 14 2. For orders on CMA No.2069/2022 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.2070/2022 19.03.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel states that the impugned judgment has already been set aside in other proceedings therefore this matter has become infructuous and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
